history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person stands on a balcony, looking down at their phone. They are wearing a dark grey hooded sweatshirt with the word "NOAH" in white lettering across the chest, and a black beanie with white gothic-style lettering that appears to say "R.I.P." White earbuds are plugged into their ears, with the cord hanging down. They are also wearing blue and white plaid shorts and dark grey flip-flops. The background shows a railing and vertical wooden slats, with some greenery and brickwork visible in the distance. The lighting is natural and appears to be daylight, casting soft shadows. The overall mood is casual and relaxed.
